title: Validator Execution Result
description: Governed structured result produced by BN.8 Validator Execution Engine. Records the outcome of running required validators in canonical order.

execution_id.description: Unique identifier for this validator execution run.

validators_requested.description: Validator names as requested by the caller (before canonical-order normalization).

validators_run.description: Validator names that were executed (in canonical order).

validators_failed.description: Validator names that failed or were blocked.

validator_results.description: Structured per-validator results in canonical execution order.

overall_status.description: Aggregate outcome: pass if all required validators passed, fail if any failed, blocked if any were missing/errored.

failure_reason_codes.description: Collected reason codes from all failed or blocked validators.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this execution was evaluated.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this validator execution result contract.

results.description: Alias for validator_results; per-validator results in canonical execution order.
